summary: I was born in Honduras in 2004, and it is where my early childhood took place. Although my dad left Honduras for the United States when I was just two months old, I stayed there until I was 13. Honduras is where my roots are, and it shaped my early years before I joined my family in the U.S.
cues: father moved to U.S. when I was 2 months old

summary: My dad moved to the United States when I was only two months old, so he was there long before I arrived. I was able to move to the U.S. with him when I was 13 years old, reuniting with my family after spending my early years in Honduras. The United States became my new home and a place where I could be with my dad and continue my life.
cues: father moved to U.S. when I was 2 months old
